My Portfolio

Work & Achievements

A curated collection of my projects, publications, and achievements throughout my career.

Project 01

Flash ORM

A powerful database-agnostic ORM built in Go with Prisma-like functionality, multi-database support (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite), and type-safe code generation for Go, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python

GoTypeScriptPythonPostgreSQLMySQLSQLiteSQLiteVitePressMongoDBRedis
CodeLive Demo
Project 02

AtomicDocs

Zero-config, auto-generated API documentation for Express.js and Hono frameworks. Built with Go and fasthttp for extreme performance with automatic route detection and Swagger UI.

GoTypeScriptJavaScriptFastHTTPExpress.jsHonoSwagger
Code
Project 03

AtomicDocs

High-performance PostgreSQL driver for Node.js built with C++ and N-API. Drop-in replacement for pg with 2-5x better performance, connection pooling, prepared statements, and LISTEN/NOTIFY support.

C++JavaScriptTypeScriptNode.jsPostgreSQLlibpqxxN-API
Code

Image Magic

A simple image editing tool that allows you to remove backgrounds,objects,recolor objects ,and resize images.

Prigen is end to end encrypted file sharing application to share file with secutiry and speed.

Project 06

PredictX

PredictX is a Telegram bot that trades tokens based on bullish tweets from user-selected X accounts, powered by AI sentiment analysis and automated price tracking.

PythonTypeScriptNodeJsFastAPITelegram Bot APIRedisDockerOpenAI APIX APIPostgresSQLCI/CDMonorepoJUPITERNGNIX
Project 07

SonicCraft

An AI-powered app where users can generate full songs from lyrics or music, clone their own voice, and sing the song in their voice with perfectly matched melodies and instrumentals.

Rosa Baker

Senior Web Developer

Senior Web Developer with 6 years of practical experience developing and maintaining web applications across both backend and frontend systems. I specialize in backend technologies including Node.js, Laravel, Nest.js, and Python, with solid experience in designing RESTful APIs, handling data processing, and managing databases. I am also skilled in frontend development using React, Vue.js, Angular, and TypeScript, focusing on building clean and user-friendly interfaces. I have experience integrating frontend and backend components to ensure stable and consistent application performance. I work effectively in collaborative environments and communicate clearly with cross-functional teams. I am comfortable using tools like Git and maintaining structured codebases to improve and extend existing applications. I focus on writing maintainable code and delivering reliable, practical solutions in real-world projects.
